title: Grisebachia ciliaris
taxonomy: Grisebachia ciliaris is classified in the family Asparagaceae, a large and diverse family of flowering plants. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the family. Grisebachia ciliaris is further categorized as belonging to the subfamily Lomandroideae, a group of plants within the Asparagaceae family that are native to Australia. The species is also a member of the genus Grisebachia, which includes a few species of flowering plants found in Australia. Grisebachia ciliaris is an important part of the Australian flora, and its classification helps us understand its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
